prompt_blocks.name: Master Oraphine Prompt
prompt_blocks.content: invented alien written language, consistent glyph system, sacred geometric alien script, tall narrow glyphs built from repeating visual components: vertical stems, eye-shaped chambers, crescents, wedges, forked terminals, nodes, bars, and floating halo marks, asymmetrical near-symmetry, recurring syntax-like motifs, cohesive visual family, looks meaningful and structured rather than random, ceremonial yet functional, ancient-futuristic, mathematical and ritualistic

prompt_blocks.name: Anti-Slop Constraint
prompt_blocks.content: avoid random decorative squiggles, avoid human letters, avoid obvious runes, avoid fake Arabic, avoid hieroglyph knockoffs, avoid logo-like icons, avoid inconsistent symbol families
